chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6105 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.27072/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 30.05.2025 Mr.Irfan Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent No.2 Mr.Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector Customs is present Statement filed on behalf of respondent No.2 is taken on record. The statement reads as follows:- “It is most respectfully submitted on behalf of above named respondent that in view of the requisite information provided by the General Administration of China Customs (GACC) through the Board, the provisional assessment in respective Goods Declarations of the petitioners are being finalized as per declared transactional value and; consequently the securities furnished at the time of provisional assessment are also being released.” In view hereof, the petition appears to have served its purpose is disposed of. Judge Judge nasir
